improvementPrompt: Analyze src/agent/loop.ts and src/llm/context.ts. Find one concrete change that reduces average token usage by at least 10% without lowering the agent's success rate on file-reading and code-search tasks. Make the change. Do not break any existing functionality.

evals.name: read-and-summarize
evals.description: Agent reads a source file and accurately summarizes its purpose
evals.prompt: Read src/agent/loop.ts and tell me in one sentence what the runAgentLoop function does. Be specific about the loop mechanism.

evals.name: search-accuracy
evals.description: Agent uses search to find all definition/usage sites of a symbol
evals.prompt: Find all files that import or use 'createProvider'. List each file and the line where it appears.

evals.name: tool-selection
evals.description: Agent picks the most efficient tool for the job
evals.prompt: What function in this codebase handles context trimming? Tell me the function name and which file it's in. Use the most efficient tool — do NOT read files one by one.

evals.name: multi-step-chain
evals.description: Agent chains tools: list dir → read file → reason about content
evals.prompt: First list the src/tools/ directory. Then read the file that handles editing. Tell me what validation the edit tool performs before writing.

evals.name: error-recovery
evals.description: Agent recovers from a failed tool call instead of repeating it
evals.prompt: Read the file src/nonexistent-12345.ts. If it fails, explain why it failed and try a different approach to find what you need.

evals.name: codebase-reasoning
evals.description: Agent synthesizes information from multiple files
evals.prompt: How does a user prompt flow through the system? Trace the path from index.ts through to an LLM API call and back. Name every file involved and its role.

evals.name: no-hallucination
evals.description: Agent does not invent functions or files that don't exist
evals.prompt: Does this project have a function called 'optimizePrompt'? Search for it and tell me definitively yes or no.

evals.name: config-awareness
evals.description: Agent understands project configuration and tool toggles
evals.prompt: Read src/utils/config.ts and tell me: what tools can be toggled on/off, and what happens when a tool is disabled?
